response.justification: Szabo meets the minimum 15+ year engineering requirement and currently works on AI-agent infrastructure at Google, demonstrating relevant technical alignment. However, the resume reflects primarily full-stack software development expertise rather than the specialized AI strategy and product innovation focus this director-level role requires. Missing preferred qualifications include an advanced degree in AI and demonstrated track record of building and shipping AI-powered products at scale. The career shows strong technical breadth and current relevance, but lacks clear evidence of director-level strategic leadership or recognized thought leadership in AI.
strengths: Meets 15+ year minimum with continuous progression through senior and staff-level roles across full-stack, cloud, and infrastructure domains
Currently at Google working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, demonstrating current engagement with AI technology and innovation
Demonstrated ability to inspire others through workshops, open-source contributions, and teaching—relevant to the mentoring and thought leadership aspects of the role
concerns: Limited evidence of specialized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products; career primarily shows full-stack application development rather than AI innovation leadership
No Master's or PhD in AI or related field, despite being a preferred qualification for this strategic director-level position
No clear evidence of director-level scope; resume shows staff/senior individual contributor roles without indication of strategic customer advising or enterprise-scale thought leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms
